title: Undead Bush
description: Makes the Bush added in 25w05a look more like the Dead Bush.
body:
Makes the Bush plant added in the [25w05a snapshot](https://minecraft.wiki/w/25w05a) look more like a variant of the already existing Dead Bush, rather than being a whole new thing.

The texture is split into 2 layers, so that when the plant is placed on the ground, only the leaves have the biome tint applied (see photos in the gallery tab). Also, the item texture now has the color of the leaves baked in, instead of using a tint index.

Using this pack in a video or modpack is fine as long as proper credit is given.

If you wish to contact me you can do so via Gmail (happyfiedyt@gmail.com), Discord (@happyfied), or the [happyfied Modrinth Feedback Form](https://forms.gle/WRtN3YQVyJuZWpuN7).

Bugs wanted.
